_meta.author: Claude (va-legislature-refine overnight autopilot)
_meta.note: VA House of Delegates batch — districts 12-16 (state tier). Holly Seibold (HD-12, D), Marcus Simon (HD-13, D), Vivian Watts (HD-14, D), Laura Jane Cohen (HD-15, D), Paul Krizek (HD-16, D). All Fairfax-County Democrats, all re-elected Nov 4, 2025. Evidence-first finalization from VPAP/LIS roll calls, the 2025/2026 reproductive-freedom (HJ1) and marriage-equality (HJ3) constitutional-amendment votes, ReproRising + Giffords scorecards, and primary campaign/legislative records. Documented credit given where earned: Watts (former Sec. of Public Safety) and Krizek score TRUE on public_justice victim-protection cells. Caveat carried in every life/marriage note: individual LIS roll-call lines are JS-rendered and were not opened cell-by-cell; the FALSEs rest on the documented unanimous-Democratic-caucus votes + co-patron status, which is a routine party-line vote and fair to score.

profile.religion: No public faith affiliation found (received the 2022 'Spirit of King Award' from First Baptist Church of Vienna, an award not a membership) — do not infer
profile.background: VA Delegate, HD-12 (Fairfax Co. — Vienna/Oakton/Fairfax); won a Jan-2023 special election (then HD-35), re-elected to HD-12 in 2023 and again Nov 4, 2025. Former Vienna elementary-school teacher; founder/ED of BRAWS (menstrual-equity nonprofit). Secretary of the House Democratic Caucus.

holly-seibold.notes_set: VA Delegate HD-12 (Fairfax/Vienna); re-elected Nov 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Uniformly progressive record. Pro-abortion-rights: within the all-Democrat YEA bloc on the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJ1, House 51-48 in 2025 / 64-34 in 2026), endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA and REPRO Rising. Pro-same-sex-marriage: within the Democratic YEA bloc on the marriage-equality amendment (HJ9/HJ3 repealing VA's man-woman clause). Public-justice leniency: sponsored HB45 (2024) expanding earned-sentence-credit eligibility. Pro-gun-control: Giffords PAC-endorsed, committed to passing an assault-weapons ban, backed the safe-storage tax credit. NO public position found on christian_liberty, federal-overreach, border/immigration, or most election-integrity cells — left null. Best-known legislative work is menstrual-equity/health curriculum (HB1221, 2024), which does not map to a Christian-conservative rubric cell. Caveat: individual LIS roll-call lines on HJ1/HJ9/HJ3 were not opened; FALSEs rest on the documented unanimous-Democratic votes.

0.note: Within the all-Democrat YEA bloc on the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJ1); endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA and REPRO Rising — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Voted to enshrine a constitutional right to abortion (HJ1) — the opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Within the Democratic YEA bloc on the marriage-equality amendment (HJ9/HJ3) repealing VA's one-man-one-woman marriage clause.

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution (HJ9/HJ3).
Sponsored HB45 (2024) expanding earned-sentence-credit eligibility — a sentencing-leniency measure, contrary to a tough-on-crime posture.
Giffords PAC-endorsed; committed to passing an assault-weapons ban and backed the safe-storage tax credit; pushed back on rollbacks of gun-control law.

profile.religion: Jewish (Reform); attends Temple Rodef Shalom, Falls Church
profile.background: VA Delegate, HD-13 (Falls Church + part of Fairfax Co.); in the House since 2014 (HD-53 to 2024, HD-13 since), re-elected Nov 4, 2025 with ~77%. Real-estate lawyer; former U.S. Army JAG captain. House Democratic Floor Leader; former chair of House Privileges & Elections.

marcus-simon.notes_set: VA Delegate HD-13 (Falls Church/Fairfax); House Democratic Floor Leader; re-elected Nov 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Uniformly progressive record with no conservative cross-party deviations (VPAP caucus-unity 94%; the 6% are non-ideological local/procedural bills). Pro-abortion-rights: co-patron/supporter of the reproductive-freedom amendment (HJ1); PP + REPRO Rising endorsed. Pro-same-sex-marriage: long-standing LGBTQ-rights sponsor (introduced SSM bills as early as 2018), supporter of the HJ3 marriage amendment, LGBT Democrats of VA endorsed. Pro-sanctuary: House conferee/lead co-patron of HB1441 (2026, Chapter 1098) barring state/local LE from assisting federal civil immigration enforcement. Pro-gun-control: Giffords-endorsed; sponsored the 2026 assault-weapons measure (HB1524), safe-storage (HB1597), and ghost-gun/plastic-firearm bans. NO scoreable evidence on christian_liberty, economic_stewardship, or family-child cells (his trans 'forced-outing' opposition is news-characterized, no primary roll call isolated → left null). Caveat: individual LIS roll-call lines not opened; life/marriage FALSEs rest on documented party-line votes + co-patron status.

0.note: Co-patron/supporter of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJ1); endorsed by Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA and REPRO Rising — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Voted the pro-abortion-access slate / co-patroned the amendment enshrining a right to abortion — opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Long-standing same-sex-marriage sponsor (since 2018); co-patron/supporter of the HJ3 marriage-equality amendment repealing VA's man-woman clause.

1.note: Sponsored/supported codifying same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

4.note: Long-standing LGBTQ-rights legislative sponsor; endorsed by LGBT Democrats of Virginia — supports promotion of LGBTQ+ identity in public policy.

2.note: House conferee / lead co-patron of HB1441 (2026, Chapter 1098), a sanctuary-style law barring state/local LE from assisting federal civil immigration enforcement — directly contrary to opposing sanctuary policy.

1.note: Giffords PAC-endorsed; sponsored the 2026 assault-weapons measure (HB1524), safe-storage (HB1597), and ghost-gun/plastic-firearm bans — supports red-flag/mag-limit/AWB regime.

profile.religion: Unitarian (Arlington Unitarian Church per VA House history bio) — not a Christian tradition; do not infer christian_liberty positions
profile.background: VA Delegate, HD-14 (Fairfax Co. — Annandale); served 1982-86 and 1996-present (longest-serving woman in VA House history), re-elected Nov 4, 2025. Former VA Secretary of Transportation & Public Safety (1986-90); senior House Finance Committee member; former ED of Fairfax CASA.

vivian-watts.notes_set: VA Delegate HD-14 (Fairfax/Annandale); longest-serving woman in VA House history; former Secretary of Public Safety; re-elected Nov 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] MIXED record — genuine documented credit on public safety. Pro-abortion-rights: co-patron of the reproductive-freedom amendment (HJ1); ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion'. Pro-same-sex-marriage: within the 64-Democrat YEA bloc on the HJ3 marriage amendment. Economic: patron of HB979 (2026, graduated 8%/10% 'millionaire' income-tax brackets) and HB978 (service-tax expansion) — tax-raising, contrary to tithe-friendly/low-tax stewardship. Public justice (DOCUMENTED CREDIT): as Public Safety Secretary made VA the first state to use DNA evidence and carried tough sex-offender bills (HB1044 bail-denial for repeat sex offenders; HB250 barring offenders from parks) and domestic-violence rapid-arrest bills → backed law enforcement (q0 TRUE) and proportional punishment/victim protection (q2 TRUE); BUT also carried sentencing-leniency reform (robbery-sentence reduction; mental-illness defense to assault-on-officer) → soft-on-crime (q1 FALSE). Pro-gun-control: Giffords champion; voted for the red-flag/ERPO law and co-patroned HB1607 (AWB + >10-round mag ban). Caveat: individual LIS roll-call lines on HJ1/HJ3 not opened; those FALSEs rest on documented party-line votes + co-patron status.

0.note: Co-patron of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJ1); ReproRising 2025 'A+ Champion' — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: ReproRising A+ requires voting against every restriction on abortion — opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Within the 64-Democrat YEA bloc on the HJ3 marriage-equality amendment repealing VA's man-woman clause.

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution (HJ3).

3.note: Patron of HB979 (2026, new 8% and 10% graduated income-tax brackets) and HB978 (expanding sales tax to services) — tax-raising, contrary to tithe-friendly/low-tax structures.

0.note: Former VA Secretary of Transportation & Public Safety; made VA the first state to use DNA evidence; carried tough sex-offender and domestic-violence law-enforcement bills — affirmative backing of law enforcement, not mere budget governance.

1.note: Also carried sentencing-leniency reform (robbery-sentence reduction with retroactive release; mental-illness/IDD defense to felony assault-on-a-police-officer) — a soft-on-crime direction.

2.note: HB1044 (deny bail to repeat felony sex offenders), HB250 (bar convicted sex offenders from state parks, passed unanimously), and domestic-violence rapid-arrest bills — proportional punishment of evildoers and victim protection.

1.note: Giffords 'proven gun safety champion'; voted for the Extreme Risk Protection Order ('red flag') law and co-patroned HB1607 (assault-weapons + >10-round magazine ban).

profile.religion: Jewish; also publicly identifies as bisexual
profile.background: VA Delegate, HD-15 (Fairfax Co. — Burke/Springfield); first elected 2023 (assumed office Jan 2024), re-elected Nov 4, 2025. Former Fairfax County School Board member (Springfield District, 2020-23); longtime Moms Demand Action volunteer.

laura-jane-cohen.notes_set: VA Delegate HD-15 (Fairfax/Burke-Springfield); former Fairfax County School Board member; re-elected Nov 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Uniformly progressive with a deep, well-documented record against this rubric. Pro-abortion-rights: chief co-patron of the reproductive-freedom amendment (HJR1); PP + NARAL/REPRO Rising endorsed; campaigns to 'defend abortion access.' Pro-same-sex-marriage: voted for the SSM amendment (HJ9/HJ3), openly bisexual, campaigns to 'repeal the ban on same-sex marriages.' Strongest HARD evidence is on FAMILY/CHILD SOVEREIGNTY: as chief patron of school safe-storage bill HB1924 (2025) she LED the rejection of Gov. Youngkin's parental-gender-notification amendment, publicly calling it 'bullying kids' (family q1 FALSE); on the School Board she seconded the motion protecting transgender students and backed gender-inclusive Family Life Education (gender identity to 7th graders) (family q2 FALSE, marriage q2/q4 FALSE). Pro-gun-control: patron + YES on the 2026 assault-weapons ban (HB217, +>15-round mag ban, enacted Chapter 1106); Giffords/Everytown endorsed; 'stop the NRA.' NO documented evidence on christian_liberty, economic, election (beyond felon-voting amendment, which doesn't map), public_justice, federalism, or immigration → null. Caveat: individual LIS roll-call lines on the amendments not opened.

0.note: Chief co-patron of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJR1); PP + NARAL endorsed; campaigns to 'defend abortion access' — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Sponsored enshrining a constitutional right to abortion — opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Voted for the SSM constitutional amendment (HJ9/HJ3); openly bisexual; campaigns to 'repeal the ban on same-sex marriages.'

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution.

2.note: On the School Board seconded the motion protecting transgender/gender-expansive students; opposed parental gender-notification, calling it 'bullying kids' — affirms, not rejects, transgender ideology.

4.note: Campaigns for 'full implementation of LGBTQIA+ protections in Virginia schools'; backed gender-inclusive Family Life Education — supports promotion of LGBTQ+ identity in schools.

1.note: Led rejection of Gov. Youngkin's amendment requiring parental notification/consent for student gender counseling, publicly calling it 'bullying kids' — opposes parental notification on minors' gender interventions.

2.note: On the School Board backed gender-inclusive Family Life Education (gender-identity content introduced to 7th graders; gender-inclusive from 4th grade) — supports SOGI/sex-ed curricula.

1.note: Patron and YES vote on HB217 (2026, assault-weapons ban + >15-round magazine ban, enacted Chapter 1106); Giffords/Everytown endorsed; campaigns to 'stop the NRA.'

profile.religion: Episcopalian — active member of St. Luke's Episcopal Church, Alexandria (former Vestry member, Endowment Committee chair). NOTE: not Catholic (J.D. from Catholic University is the likely source of that confusion)
profile.background: VA Delegate, HD-16 (Fairfax Co. — Mount Vernon/SE Fairfax); in the House since 2016 (formerly HD-47), re-elected Nov 4, 2025. Chief Counsel/VP of Christian Relief Services Charities; former immigration constituent-services aide to Rep. Jim Moran; attorney. Chairs the Appropriations Transportation & Public Safety subcommittee and the General Laws ABC/Gaming subcommittee.

paul-krizek.notes_set: VA Delegate HD-16 (Fairfax/Mount Vernon); re-elected Nov 2025. [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement, state tier] Reliable progressive with one documented public-justice credit. Pro-abortion-rights: patron of the reproductive-freedom amendment (HJ1); accepted Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA endorsement ('allowing women to make their own medical decisions is a core value we share'); says he 'kept abortion legal.' Pro-same-sex-marriage: voted for the HJ3 marriage amendment (64-Democrat bloc). Economic: backs a $15 minimum wage and repeal of right-to-work, but these do not map to the state economic cells (CBDC/balanced-budget/tithe-tax/ESG) → null. Public justice (DOCUMENTED CREDIT): sponsored increased penalties for electronic stalking/tracking and established a State Human-Trafficking Coordinator → proportional punishment of evildoers + victim protection (q2 TRUE); sits on the VA State Crime Commission. Pro-gun-control: own stated positions backing an assault-weapons ban, magazine limits, red-flag, and universal background checks; voted for the 2020 and 2026 AWB packages. NOTE: a skill-games SKEPTIC (rewrote the bill for tougher regulation, sought a moratorium) — a pro-regulation, not free-market, posture; not a conservative deviation. NO evidence on christian_liberty, family-child, federalism, or scoreable immigration cells → null. Caveat: individual LIS roll-call lines on HJ1/HJ3 not opened.

0.note: Patron of the reproductive-freedom constitutional amendment (HJ1); accepted Planned Parenthood Advocates of VA endorsement, stating 'allowing women to make their own medical decisions is a core value we share' — does not affirm personhood from conception.

1.note: Voted to enshrine a constitutional right to abortion (HJ1) — opposite of abortion-abolition legislation.

0.note: Within the 64-Democrat YEA bloc on the HJ3 marriage-equality amendment repealing VA's man-woman clause.

1.note: Voted to codify same-sex marriage in the Virginia Constitution (HJ3).

2.note: Sponsored increased penalties for unauthorized electronic tracking in stalking cases and established a State Human-Trafficking Coordinator — proportional punishment of evildoers and protection of victims.

1.note: Own stated positions back banning assault weapons, limiting magazine capacity, the red-flag/ERPO law, and universal background checks; voted for the 2020 and 2026 assault-weapons packages.
